raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A green chip bag lies on a dark table. The bag is flexible with a printed design; it is the only object on the table. STRATEGY - reach the bag at its body for a stable grasp, lift it, and transport it to a new location. Failure modes include dropping the bag during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the bag body; Step 2 grasp the bag body for secure hold; Step 3 transport the bag to a new location.**
Goal: on(green_chip_bag, table); stable(green_chip_bag)
Scene: green_chip_bag, table
Step 1: reach(green_chip_bag)
  affordance_region: the body of the green chip bag
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_chip_bag, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_chip_bag) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_chip_bag)
  affordance_region: the body of the green chip bag
  contact: holding(green_chip_bag) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_chip_bag)
Step 3: transport(green_chip_bag -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table
  spatial: above(green_chip_bag, table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_chip_bag)
  done_when: above(green_chip_bag, table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(green_chip_bag -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table
  contact: surface_contact(green_chip_bag, table) [completion]; released(green_chip_bag) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_chip_bag) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(green_chip_bag, table) AND released(green_chip_bag)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the green chip bag
the body of the green chip bag
an empty area on the table
an empty area on the table
